caption: A news broadcast features a split-screen layout with Bola Tinubu on the left and a smaller inset video of Olusola Oyekanmi on the right. Tinubu wears a light blue traditional garment and a blue and white patterned cap, looking toward the camera. Oyekanmi, appearing "ON THE PHONE," wears a red cap and a dark outfit, positioned against a purple background with the text "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and "POLITICAL ANALYST" above the location "LAGOS." The screen is branded with the "plusTV" logo in the upper left corner. A white banner at the bottom displays "PLUS POLITICS" followed by the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." Across the frames, the visuals remain static, but the lower ticker changes; it initially shows "WATCH ON" with "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308" logos, then shifts to "WATCH ONLINE" with the URL "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV," and finally "SUBSCRIBE" with "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE."
